creator: martin.dieringer@gmx.de
text:
(In reply to m.ne from comment #7)

If you want to change the maintainer, please do. Also for frescobaldi.

For me fetching doesn't work:

# make
===>  License LGPL21 LGPL3 accepted by the user
===>   py36-python-poppler-0.24.2 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
=> python-poppler-qt5-0.24.2.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/source/p/python-poppler/python-poppler-qt5-0.24.2.tar.gz
fetch: https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/source/p/python-poppler/python-poppler-qt5-0.24.2.tar.gz: Not Found
=> Attempting to fetch https://pypi.org/packages/source/p/python-poppler/python-poppler-qt5-0.24.2.tar.gz
fetch: https://pypi.org/packages/source/p/python-poppler/python-poppler-qt5-0.24.2.tar.gz: Not Found
=> Attempting to fetch http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/python-poppler-qt5-0.24.2.tar.gz
fetch: http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/python-poppler-qt5-0.24.2.tar.gz: Not Found
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /usr/ports/distfiles/ and try again.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
